name: Trellix EDR
description: Integrates with Trellix Endpoint Detection and Response API for threat detection, real-time search on endpoints, and automated response actions

actions.name: Get Threats
actions.description: Retrieve threat detections from the Trellix EDR monitoring dashboard

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: OData filter expression for threat query

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of threats to return

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Number of records to skip for pagination

actions.name: Get Detections
actions.description: Retrieve EDR detections with filtering and pagination

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: OData filter expression (e.g., severity eq 'high')

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Number of records to skip

parameters.name: $orderby
parameters.description: Sort order (e.g., firstDetected desc)

actions.name: Get Affected Hosts
actions.description: Retrieve the list of hosts affected by a specific threat or detection

parameters.name: threat_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the threat

actions.name: Search Devices
actions.description: Search for managed devices (endpoints) in the Trellix EDR environment

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: OData filter expression (e.g., hostname eq 'WORKSTATION01')

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of devices to return

actions.name: Start Real-Time Search
actions.description: Initiate a real-time search on endpoints to query live endpoint data for threat hunting

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The real-time search query expression

parameters.name: hostnames
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of target hostnames

parameters.name: collector_type
parameters.description: Type of data collector (processes, files, registry, network)

actions.name: Get Real-Time Search Results
actions.description: Retrieve the results of a previously initiated real-time search

parameters.name: search_id
parameters.description: The ID of the real-time search session

actions.name: Execute Reaction
actions.description: Execute a response action (reaction) on an endpoint such as killing a process or quarantining a file

parameters.name: reaction_type
parameters.description: Type of reaction to execute (killProcess, quarantineFile, removeFile)

parameters.name: target_host
parameters.description: Hostname of the target endpoint

parameters.name: target_value
parameters.description: The target of the reaction (process name, file path, or hash)

actions.name: Run Historical Search
actions.description: Execute a historical search query against cloud-stored endpoint telemetry data

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The historical search query expression

parameters.name: from_date
parameters.description: Start date for the search window (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: to_date
parameters.description: End date for the search window (ISO 8601)
